personal.preferred_title: Software/Data Engineer | Financial Data, Python, SQL, Vendor Ingestion & LLM Tooling

summary: Senior Software/Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building Python and SQL data pipelines, financial-services reporting systems, vendor-style data ingestion workflows, data validation processes, and internal analytics tooling. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, Oracle, Redshift, MySQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, API integration concepts, data integrity checks, automated reporting, production troubleshooting, and regulated financial environments. Experienced supporting front-office-style decision workflows through trusted data products, executive analytics, forecasting pipelines, and emerging LLM/RAG/agentic tool workflows including MCP-style internal tool integration concepts.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and reporting workflows with repeatable data flows.

Designed SQL-driven Oracle schemas, Redshift-backed reporting structures, historical data models, and curated datasets supporting capacity risk analysis, forecasting, executive reporting, and operational decision-making.
Developed Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue workflows to collect, normalize, validate, and analyze large datasets across multiple enterprise platforms.

Created automated data integrity routines including validation checks, reconciliation logic, freshness-style checks, exception identification, and root-cause troubleshooting for recurring production datasets.
Integrated data from enterprise monitoring and operational platforms including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, CMDB-style sources, and reporting databases into unified analytics workflows.
Translated stakeholder requirements into technical data models, pipeline outputs, reporting datasets, dashboards, and analytical decision-support workflows.
Built ML-enabled forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead and support data-driven infrastructure planning.
Built dashboard-ready datasets and visualization workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Oracle, Redshift, and enterprise telemetry data.
Used AI-assisted development, RAG-style retrieval, and agentic workflow patterns to accelerate structured artifact generation, documentation, code review, and repeatable data engineering work.
Documented data definitions, transformation logic, validation rules, operational procedures, and support runbooks for production reporting and audit-friendly knowledge transfer.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume described internally as 10x VISA scale.
Designed validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and protect data integrity during phased cutover.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, migration-readiness checks, and cutover-support workflows for high-volume relational systems.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Worked deeply with relational database design, OLTP behavior, SQL access patterns, performance tuning, operational reliability, and data migration risk.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large financial-services monitoring and reporting environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerting logic, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, onboarding material, repeatable support procedures, and stakeholder-facing reporting workflows.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating web systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboards, transaction tracing, production troubleshooting, and reporting continuity.
Collaborated across engineering teams during monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting quality through Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 and TLS 1.2 security cutovers.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve observability during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-risk findings used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.
Supported production troubleshooting, QA cycles, defect triage, and release support for mission-critical telecom billing processes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Oracle SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java, Object-Oriented Design
skills.Data Ingestion & Integration: Third-Party Data Imports, API-Based Integration Concepts, Asynchronous Data Fetching Concepts, Data Normalization, Source-to-Target Mapping, Data Onboarding
skills.Databases: Microsoft SQL Server Concepts, Oracle, Oracle RAC, MySQL, PostgreSQL, DB2, Redshift, SQL/NoSQL Concepts, Redis Concepts
skills.Data Quality & Validation: Manual and Automated Data Integrity Checks, Validation Rules, Reconciliation, Exception Detection, Data Cleaning, Duplicate Checks, Root Cause Analysis
skills.Big Data / Analytics: Spark, PySpark, Hadoop Concepts, Large Dataset Processing, Analytical Tests, Mathematical Algorithm Concepts, Data Warehouse Patterns, Reporting Datasets
skills.LLM / MCP / AI Tooling: Model Context Protocol Concepts, MCP Server Design Concepts, LLM Tool Integration, RAG / Vector Embeddings, Claude Code, Agentic Workflows, Internal Tool Automation
skills.Internal Tools & Productivity: Jira Integration Concepts, Confluence Integration Concepts, Proprietary Database Integration, Internal Analytics Tooling, Automated Tool Execution Concepts
skills.Visualization / UI: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Dashboard Data Preparation, Internal Visualization Tools, Portfolio Review Data Concepts
skills.DevOps / Delivery: Git, Agile Development, CI/CD Pipeline Design Concepts, Docker, Technical Documentation, Production Troubleshooting, Code Inspection

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline / Agentic Workflow System
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic workflow using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers for semantic matching, scoring, structured JSON/YAML artifact generation, quality gates, and repeatable internal tool-like automation.

projects.name: Financial Reporting Automation at Citi
projects.description: Replaced manual telemetry collection and reporting workflows with automated SQL, Python, Oracle, Redshift, and AWS-oriented pipelines producing repeatable executive reporting and risk/capacity analytics.

projects.name: High-Volume MySQL to Oracle RAC Migration
projects.description: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, including validation tooling, schema conversion, performance tuning, and phased cutover support.
